name: Employee-custom_pass_type
label: Pass / Visa Type
options:
Employment Pass
Visitor Pass (Temporary Employment)
Work Permit
Malaysia PR
Citizen
Other
description: Pass or visa type of the employee. Used to determine EPF auto-registration eligibility (EP/VP holders from Oct 2025: EPF auto-registers via first contribution submission).

name: Employee-custom_is_domestic_servant
label: Is Domestic Servant (EPF Excluded)
description: Flag foreign domestic servants (maids, cooks, cleaners, drivers, gardeners in private households). These employees are excluded from the October 2025 EPF mandatory contribution per KWSP circular.

name: Employee-custom_nationality_code
label: Nationality Code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)
description: 2-letter ISO country code for foreign workers (e.g. PH, BD, ID). Required by LHDN for foreign worker self-billed invoices.

name: Employee-custom_payment_means_code
label: Payment Means Code
options:
01 : Cash
03 : Cheque
30 : Credit Transfer
42 : Bank Transfer
48 : Debit Card

name: Salary Component-custom_lhdn_classification_code
label: LHDN Classification Code
options:
022 : Others
024 : Private retirement scheme or deferred annuity scheme
027 : Reimbursement
032 : Foreign income
036 : Self-billed - Others
037 : Self-billed - Monetary payment to agents, dealers or distributors
040 : Voluntary contribution to approved provident fund
044 : Vouchers, gift cards, loyalty points
045 : Self-billed - Non-monetary payment to agents, dealers or distributors

name: Salary Slip-custom_lhdn_status
label: LHDN Status
options:
Pending
Submitted
Valid
Invalid
Exempt
Cancelled

name: Expense Claim-custom_expense_category
label: Expense Category
options:
Self-Billed Required
Employee Receipt Provided
Overseas - Exempt

name: Expense Claim-custom_lhdn_status
label: LHDN Status
options:
Pending
Submitted
Valid
Invalid
Exempt
Cancelled

name: Expense Claim Type-custom_lhdn_classification_code
label: LHDN Classification Code
options:
022 : Others
027 : Reimbursement
036 : Self-billed - Others
037 : Self-billed - Monetary payment to agents, dealers or distributors
045 : Self-billed - Non-monetary payment to agents, dealers or distributors

name: Employee-custom_state_code
label: State Code
options:
01 : Johor
02 : Kedah
03 : Kelantan
04 : Melaka
05 : Negeri Sembilan
06 : Pahang
07 : Pulau Pinang
08 : Perak
09 : Perlis
10 : Selangor
11 : Terengganu
12 : Sabah
13 : Sarawak
14 : W.P. Kuala Lumpur
15 : W.P. Putrajaya
16 : W.P. Labuan
17 : Not Applicable

name: Company-custom_state_code
label: State Code
options:
01 : Johor
02 : Kedah
03 : Kelantan
04 : Melaka
05 : Negeri Sembilan
06 : Pahang
07 : Pulau Pinang
08 : Perak
09 : Perlis
10 : Selangor
11 : Terengganu
12 : Sabah
13 : Sarawak
14 : W.P. Kuala Lumpur
15 : W.P. Putrajaya
16 : W.P. Labuan
17 : Not Applicable

name: Company-custom_annual_revenue_tier
label: Annual Revenue Tier
options:
Above RM100M
RM25M to RM100M
RM5M to RM25M
RM1M to RM5M
Below RM1M (Exempt)

name: Salary Component-custom_lhdn_exclude_from_invoice
label: Exclude from LHDN Invoice
description: When checked, this salary component will be excluded from self-billed e-Invoice lines

name: Salary Component-custom_is_pcb_component
label: Is PCB Component
description: Mark this component as the Monthly Tax Deduction (PCB / Potongan Cukai Berjadual) component

name: Salary Component-custom_is_epf_employee
label: Is EPF Employee Contribution
description: Mark this component as the employee EPF (KWSP) deduction

name: Salary Component-custom_is_epf_employer
label: Is EPF Employer Contribution
description: Mark this component as the employer EPF (KWSP) contribution

name: Salary Component-custom_is_gratuity_or_leave_encashment
label: Is Gratuity / Leave Encashment
description: Mark this component as gratuity or leave encashment (qualifies for Schedule 6 para 25 tax exemption: RM1,000 per year of service)

name: Salary Component-custom_ea_section
label: EA Form Section (Borang EA)
description: Map this earnings component to the corresponding Borang EA Section B line item (B1-B11). Leave blank for components not on Borang EA.
options:
B1 Basic Salary
B2 Overtime
B3 Commission
B4 Bonus
B5 Gratuity
B6 Allowance
B7 BIK
B8 Leave Encashment
B9 Other Gains
B10 ESOS Gain
B11 Pension

name: Employee-custom_pcb_category
label: PCB Category
description: LHDN PCB Category: 1 = Single / Married (working spouse), 2 = Married (non-working spouse, RM4,000 relief), 3 = Single Parent (RM4,000 relief, ITA s.46A). Required for CP39 CSV upload.

name: Employee-custom_annual_zakat
label: Annual Zakat (RM)
description: Annual Zakat paid by employee. Under ITA 1967 s.6A(3), Zakat reduces PCB payable ringgit-for-ringgit (net_pcb = gross_pcb - annual_zakat/12). Also reported in CP39 CSV and EA Form Section C5.

name: Employee-custom_cp38_amount
label: CP38 Additional Deduction (RM)
description: LHDN CP38 notice: additional PCB deduction above normal MTD (ITA s.107(1)(b)). Employer personally liable for non-deduction plus 10% surcharge.

name: Employee-custom_cp38_notice_ref
label: CP38 Notice Reference
description: Reference number of the CP38 notice issued by LHDN.

name: Employee-custom_cp38_expiry
label: CP38 Expiry Date
description: CP38 additional deduction is active only while today <= this date. Deduction is ignored after expiry.

name: Company-custom_hrdf_levy_rate
label: HRDF Levy Rate
description: HRDF levy rate: 0.5% for 10-49 employees, 1.0% for 50+ employees

name: Company-custom_mytax_client_id
label: MyTax Client ID
description: LHDN MyTax API client_id for e-PCB Plus programmatic CP39 submission.

name: Company-custom_mytax_client_secret
label: MyTax Client Secret
description: LHDN MyTax API client_secret for e-PCB Plus programmatic CP39 submission.

name: Company-custom_mytax_employer_rep_name
label: MyTax Employer Representative Name (Wakil Majikan)
description: Name of the Wakil Majikan registered on MyTax portal for e-CP22 submission.

name: Company-custom_mytax_employer_rep_login_id
label: MyTax Employer Representative Login ID
description: MyTax portal login ID (email/NRIC) of the Wakil Majikan authorized to submit e-CP22.

name: Company-custom_mytax_employer_rep_auth_date
label: MyTax Employer Representative Authorization Date
description: Date when the Wakil Majikan was authorized as Employer Representative on MyTax.

name: Company-custom_epf_employer_registration
label: EPF Employer Registration Number
description: KWSP/EPF employer registration number for i-Akaun electronic upload file (EPF Act 1991 s.43(3)).

name: Company-custom_socso_employer_number
label: SOCSO Employer Number
description: PERKESO SOCSO employer registration number for e-Caruman electronic upload file (SOCSO Act 1969).

name: Salary Component-custom_day_type
label: OT Day Type
description: For overtime components: specify the type of day worked.

name: Salary Component-custom_ot_hours_claimed
label: OT Hours Claimed
description: Number of overtime hours claimed for this component.

name: Employee-custom_fw_levy_rate
label: Foreign Worker Annual Levy (MYR)
description: Annual FWCMS levy amount per Foreign Workers Levy Act 2021. Rates: RM410-RM2,500/year based on sector and nationality (MTLM effective Jan 2025).

name: Employee-custom_fw_levy_due_date
label: Levy Renewal Due Date
description: Date by which the annual FWCMS levy must be renewed. System alerts HR when overdue or due within 30 days.

name: Employee-custom_fw_levy_receipt_ref
label: Levy Receipt Reference
description: Receipt reference number from FWCMS / Immigration Department for the most recent levy payment.

name: Company-custom_maybank_org_code
label: Maybank Org Code
description: 5-digit Maybank M2E organisation code for payroll disbursement file.

name: Company-custom_cimb_org_code
label: CIMB Org Code
description: CIMB BizChannel organisation code for payroll disbursement file.

name: Employee-custom_bank_name
label: Bank Name
options:
Maybank
CIMB
Public Bank
RHB
Hong Leong Bank
Bank Islam
AmBank
Alliance Bank
Affin Bank
Bank Rakyat
description: Employee primary bank for payroll disbursement.

name: Employee-custom_bank_code
label: Bank Account Number
description: Employee bank account number (8-20 digits). Used as PayNet code in disbursement files.

name: Employee-custom_account_type
label: Account Type
description: Bank account type for payroll disbursement.

name: Employee-custom_director_fee_payment_frequency
label: Director Fee Payment Frequency
description: Frequency of director fee payment. Used for PCB Section 5 fee-only MTD formula.

name: Employee-custom_leave_compliance_section
label: Leave Compliance (EA 1955)
description: Maternity and paternity leave tracking per Employment Act 1955 S.37 and S.60FA.

name: Employee-custom_maternity_leave_taken
label: Maternity Leave Taken (Days)
description: Cumulative maternity leave days taken this confinement. Max 98 consecutive days per EA S.37.

name: Employee-custom_paternity_leave_taken
label: Paternity Leave Taken (Days)
description: Paternity leave days taken for current birth. Max 7 consecutive days per EA S.60FA.

name: Employee-custom_paternity_births_claimed
label: Paternity Births Claimed
description: Total live births for which paternity leave has been claimed. Max 5 per EA S.60FA.

name: Employee-custom_contracted_weekly_hours
label: Contracted Weekly Hours
description: Standard contracted working hours per week. Used for Employment Act S.60A(1) weekly hours compliance check. Default 45 (statutory maximum post-2022 amendment).

name: Employee-custom_is_tax_equalised
label: Tax Equalised (Gross-Up)
description: If checked, employer bears the Malaysian income tax so employee receives agreed net salary.

name: Employee-custom_dta_country
label: DTA Country
options:
SG
GB
US
AU
CN
JP
DE
NL
IN
ID
description: Country of tax residence for DTA treaty relief. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

name: Employee-custom_malaysia_presence_days
label: Malaysia Presence Days (YTD)
description: Year-to-date days physically present in Malaysia. Used for 182-day residency rule under ITA 1967 s.7.

name: Employee-custom_approved_pension_scheme
label: Approved Pension Scheme (Sch. 6 Para 30)
description: ITA 1967 Schedule 6 paragraph 30: retirement gratuity from an approved company pension scheme is fully exempt for employees retiring at age 55 (or compulsory retirement age 60). When enabled, 100% of gratuity is exempt instead of RM1,000/year (para 25).

name: Company-custom_xml_signature_section
label: XAdES XML Digital Signature
description: US-086: XAdES BeS digital signature for MyInvois Self-Billed Phase 2.

name: Company-custom_enable_xml_signature
label: Enable XML Digital Signature
description: When enabled, self-billed payroll XML is signed with XAdES BeS (RSA-SHA256) before submission.

name: Company-custom_digital_cert_path
label: Digital Certificate Path
description: Absolute path to the PEM or PFX/P12 certificate file (MSC Trustgate or DigiCert Malaysia).

name: Company-custom_digital_cert_password
label: Digital Certificate Password
description: Password for the PFX/P12 certificate file. Leave blank if using a PEM key without password.

name: Salary Slip-custom_salary_currency
label: Salary Currency
description: Leave blank or set MYR for standard Ringgit slips. Set to foreign currency (USD, SGD, etc.) for expatriate employees.

name: Salary Slip-custom_exchange_rate_to_myr
label: Exchange Rate to MYR
description: Exchange rate at date of payment (BNM middle rate). Auto-fetched if Currency Exchange records exist. For MYR slips, always 1.0.

name: Salary Slip-custom_gross_myr
label: Gross Pay (MYR Equivalent)
description: Gross pay converted to MYR. Used for PCB, EA Form, and CP39 reporting (ITA 1967 s.13 / LHDN PCB Spec).

name: Company-custom_lhdn_webhook_secret
label: LHDN Webhook Secret
description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for validating X-LHDN-Signature headers from MyInvois webhook callbacks.

name: Employee-custom_labour_jurisdiction
label: Labour Jurisdiction
description: Applicable employment ordinance jurisdiction. Peninsular Malaysia = EA 1955; Sabah = Labour Ordinance Cap. 67; Sarawak = Labour Ordinance Cap. 76. Auto-set from State Code.

name: Company-custom_is_statutory_employer
label: Statutory / Government Body Employer
description: ITA 1967 Section 83A: statutory bodies, GLCs, and government-linked companies must issue Borang EC instead of Borang EA. When enabled, EC Form generation is used by default.

name: Company-custom_local_employee_count
label: Local Employee Count (MTLM)
description: Number of local (Malaysian) employees. Used for Multi-Tier Levy Model (MTLM) dependency ratio calculation. dependency_ratio = foreign_count / (local_count + foreign_count).

name: Company-custom_foreign_employee_count
label: Foreign Worker Count (MTLM)
description: Number of foreign workers. Used for MTLM tier determination: Tier 1 (<15% ratio, RM410/yr), Tier 2 (15-30%, RM1,230/yr), Tier 3 (>30%, RM2,500/yr).

name: Employee-custom_cessation_section
label: Cessation & Tax Clearance (e-SPC)
description: Fields for CP21/CP22A e-SPC submission via MyTax. Mandatory from 1 January 2025.

name: Employee-custom_cessation_type
label: Cessation Type
options:
Resignation
Retirement
Termination
Departure from Malaysia
Death
description: Type of employment cessation. Determines which e-SPC form is required: CP22A (Resignation/Retirement/Termination/Death) or CP21 (Departure from Malaysia).

name: Employee-custom_cessation_date
label: Cessation Date
description: Date of last employment/departure. e-SPC must be submitted at least 30 days before this date.

name: Employee-custom_spc_status
label: SPC Status
description: Status of Surat Penyelesaian Cukai (SPC / tax clearance letter). Final salary must be withheld until Cleared per ITA 1967 s.83(3).

name: Employee-custom_spc_reference_number
label: SPC Reference Number
description: SPC reference number issued by LHDN upon clearance. Store here for audit trail.

name: Employee-custom_spc_clearance_date
label: SPC Clearance Date
description: Date SPC clearance letter received from LHDN. Required audit trail per ITA 1967.

name: Company-custom_epcb_plus_registration_status
label: e-PCB Plus Registration Status
description: e-PCB Plus is mandatory from 3 February 2025 for all PCB submissions via MyTax portal. Register the PCB Administrator via MyTax before submitting CP39.

name: Company-custom_epcb_plus_employer_e_number
label: Employer Reference Number (E Number)
description: E Number issued by LHDN during employer registration. Required on all e-PCB Plus submissions.

name: Company-custom_epcb_plus_pcb_admin_nric
label: PCB Administrator NRIC
description: NRIC of the individual designated as PCB Administrator on MyTax e-PCB Plus.

name: Company-custom_epcb_plus_pcb_admin_name
label: PCB Administrator Name
description: Full name of the PCB Administrator as registered on MyTax.

name: Company-custom_epcb_plus_employer_rep_nric
label: Employer Representative NRIC
description: Optional: NRIC of the Employer Representative if different from PCB Administrator. Role hierarchy: Employer > Employer Representative > PCB Administrator.

name: Employee-custom_socso_number
label: SOCSO Number
description: Employee SOCSO (PERKESO) registration number. Required for Borang 34 accident notification.

name: Company-custom_perkeso_employer_code
label: PERKESO Employer Code
description: Employer PERKESO code for Borang 34 accident submissions and SOCSO filings.

name: Employee-custom_ep_section
label: Employment Pass (EP)
description: Employment Pass details for expatriate employees (ESD/IMI). Required for EP salary threshold validation effective 1 June 2026.

name: Employee-custom_ep_category
label: EP Category
options:
Not Applicable
Cat I
Cat II
Cat III
description: ESD Employment Pass category. Cat I: RM20,000+/mo; Cat II: RM10,000-19,999; Cat III: RM5,000-9,999 (effective 1 Jun 2026).

name: Employee-custom_ep_number
label: Employment Pass Number
description: Employment Pass reference number issued by ESD/IMI.

name: Employee-custom_ep_expiry_date
label: EP Expiry Date
description: Expiry date of the Employment Pass. System will alert HR when expiry is within 90 days.

name: Salary Slip-custom_ep_override_justification
label: EP Override Justification
description: If gross salary is below the EP category minimum (effective 1 Jun 2026), enter justification to allow submission. Audit-logged.

name: Salary Slip-custom_pcb_amount
label: PCB (Monthly Tax Deduction)
description: Potongan Cukai Bulanan â€” auto-calculated from PCB salary component on payroll processing.

name: Salary Slip-custom_epf_employee
label: EPF Employee
description: Employee EPF (KWSP) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Salary Slip-custom_epf_employer
label: EPF Employer
description: Employer EPF (KWSP) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Salary Slip-custom_socso_employee
label: SOCSO Employee
description: Employee SOCSO (PERKESO) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Salary Slip-custom_socso_employer
label: SOCSO Employer
description: Employer SOCSO (PERKESO) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Salary Slip-custom_eis_employee
label: EIS Employee
description: Employee EIS (SIP) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Salary Slip-custom_eis_employer
label: EIS Employer
description: Employer EIS (SIP) contribution amount â€” auto-calculated from salary component.

name: Company-custom_eis_employer_number
label: EIS Registration Number
description: Employment Insurance System (EIS) registration number. Automatic with SOCSO registration (EIS Act 2017).

name: Company-custom_hrdf_corp_registration_number
label: HRD Corp Registration Number
description: HRD Corp (formerly HRDF) registration number. Compulsory for employers with 10+ Malaysian employees in covered sectors (PSMB Act 2001 Regulation 4(1)).

name: Company-custom_first_employee_hire_date
label: Date of First Employee Hire
description: Auto-populated: earliest active employee date of joining. Used to calculate statutory registration deadline compliance.

name: Company-custom_statutory_epf_status
label: EPF Status
description: EPF status (auto-updated daily). Deadline: 7 working days from first hire (EPF Act 1991). Penalty: RM10,000/3 years. Portal: i-akaun.kwsp.gov.my

name: Company-custom_statutory_socso_status
label: SOCSO Status
description: SOCSO status (auto-updated daily). Deadline: 30 days from first hire (SSA 1969 s.7). Penalty: RM5,000/2 years. Portal: perkeso.gov.my

name: Company-custom_statutory_lhdn_e_number_status
label: LHDN E-Number Status
description: LHDN E-Number status (auto-updated daily). Deadline: 7 days from first hire (ITA 1967). Portal: edaftar.hasil.gov.my

name: Company-custom_statutory_eis_status
label: EIS Status
description: EIS status (auto-updated daily). Automatic with SOCSO registration (EIS Act 2017). Portal: perkeso.gov.my

name: Company-custom_statutory_hrdf_status
label: HRD Corp Status
description: HRD Corp status (auto-updated daily). Required when 10+ Malaysian employees (PSMB Act 2001 Reg 4(1)). Portal: hrdcorp.gov.my

name: Leave Application-custom_hospitalization_discharge_date
label: Hospital Discharge Date
description: Date of discharge from hospital (EA S.60F(2) â€” required for Hospitalization Leave)

name: Leave Application-custom_medical_certificate_type
label: Medical Certificate Type
description: Type of medical certificate supporting this hospitalization leave (EA S.60F(2))

name: Employee-custom_tax_residency_status
label: Tax Residency Status
description: LHDN tax residency status. Non-Resident: 30% flat PCB, no TP1 reliefs. Resident: progressive PCB with reliefs.

name: Employee-custom_tax_residency_effective_date
label: Residency Status Effective Date
description: The date from which the new tax residency status applies for PCB calculation.

name: Employee TP1 Relief-custom_reliefs_suspended
label: Reliefs Suspended (Non-Resident)
description: Set to 1 when the employee is Non-Resident. Suspends all TP1 reliefs for this assessment year.

name: Employee-custom_epf_iakaun_registration_confirmed
label: EPF i-Akaun Registration Confirmed
description: Tick once the foreign employee has been registered in EPF i-Akaun Employer portal.

name: Employee-custom_epf_iakaun_registration_date
label: EPF i-Akaun Registration Date
description: Date the EPF i-Akaun registration was confirmed in the employer portal.

name: Employee-custom_oku_section
label: OKU (Disability) Details
description: Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat Kad OKU tracking for ITA 1967 S.34(6)(n) double deduction.

name: Employee-custom_is_oku
label: Is OKU (Disabled Employee)
description: Employee holds a valid Disability Card (Kad OKU) from Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat. Enables double deduction under ITA 1967 S.34(6)(n).

name: Employee-custom_kad_oku_number
label: Kad OKU Number
description: Disability Card (Kad OKU) reference number issued by Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat.

name: Employee-custom_kad_oku_expiry_date
label: Kad OKU Expiry Date
description: Expiry date of the Kad OKU. An alert is raised 60 days before expiry to prompt renewal.

name: Employee-custom_prs_provider_name
label: PRS Provider Name
description: SC-approved Private Retirement Scheme provider (e.g. AmInvest, CIMB-Principal, Public Mutual).

name: Employee-custom_prs_account_number
label: PRS Account Number
description: Employee's PRS member account number for contribution remittance.

name: Salary Component-custom_is_prs_voluntary
label: Is PRS Voluntary Deduction
description: Check this for Private Retirement Scheme (PRS) voluntary deduction components.
